content.speakerText: I noticed you’ve been avoiding team feedback sessions — any reason?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你最近避开了团队反馈会，有原因吗？

options.text: I don’t think feedback is useful.
You're right — I’ve been nervous about it. I’d like to get better at receiving feedback.
Someone else should be handling this.
I’m too busy to care about meetings.

content.explanation: 正确答案承认问题并表达改进意愿，符合职场接受反馈的积极态度。其他选项都表现出防御性、消极或推卸责任，不符合职场沟通规范。

content.speakerText: I think you could step up more in cross-department meetings — your insights are valuable.
content.speakerTextCn: 我觉得你在跨部门会议中可以更主动些，你的见解很有价值。

options.text: I guess I’m just not good at speaking in groups.
That makes sense — I’ll prepare talking points ahead of next meeting.
Can you speak for me instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案以具体行动回应建设性反馈，展现专业态度。其他选项或消极抱怨、或推卸责任，缺乏改进意愿，不符合职场沟通标准。

content.speakerText: Your reports have been a bit rushed lately — could you take a little more time to review them?
content.speakerTextCn: 你最近的报告有点仓促，能不能花更多时间检查一下？

options.text: I don’t have time to redo everything.
I’m sorry — I’ll set aside time before submitting to double-check everything.
Maybe you should check them instead.
I thought they were fine as they are.

content.explanation: 正确答案承认问题并提出具体改进措施，体现责任感。其他选项推卸责任、消极抗拒或否认问题，不符合接受反馈的积极态度。
